summary: The type of remission—specifically, complete versus partial—is a significant predictor of relapse risk during four years post-depression; individuals who achieve full remission have substantially reduced chances of recurrence compared to those only partially recovered. \boxed{\text{A}}
formatted_summary: agent2 (Round 2 summarized): The type of remission—specifically, complete versus partial—is a significant predictor of relapse risk during four years post-depression; individuals who achieve full remission have substantially reduced chances of recurrence compared to those only partially recovered. \boxed{\text{A}}. Answer choice: A
